data.body: S3 (JWKS verifier) VALIDATED 22/22 held-out (rejections, typ enforce/skip, symmetric-refusal, SSRF+timeout, fetch-fail deny, exactly-1-fetch cooldown, rotation, transport) + mutation teeth (neuter symmetric-guard->RED, neuter typ->RED).
